mapper.sql:
select dcl.user_info_user_info_id_1 , dcl.create_time , dcl.action_type , shd.smart_device_type_enum_smart_device_type_enum_id_1 , shd.is_on , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , shd.current_value , shd.room_name , shd.last_update_time , dcl.smart_home_device_smart_device_id_1 , shd.device_name , ui.password , shd.brightness , dcl.device_control_log_id , shd.smart_device_status_enum_smart_device_status_enum_id_1 , dcl.action_value , shd.user_info_user_info_id_1 as user_info_user_info_id_1_shd , ui.phone_number , ui.username
FROM device_control_log dcl left join smart_home_device shd on dcl.smart_home_device_smart_device_id_1 = shd.smart_device_id left join user_info ui on dcl.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id
mapper.select:
select dcl.user_info_user_info_id_1 , dcl.create_time , dcl.action_type , shd.smart_device_type_enum_smart_device_type_enum_id_1 , shd.is_on , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , shd.current_value , shd.room_name , shd.last_update_time , dcl.smart_home_device_smart_device_id_1 , shd.device_name , ui.password , shd.brightness , dcl.device_control_log_id , shd.smart_device_status_enum_smart_device_status_enum_id_1 , dcl.action_value , shd.user_info_user_info_id_1 as user_info_user_info_id_1_shd , ui.phone_number , ui.username
FROM device_control_log dcl left join
smart_home_device
shd on dcl.smart_home_device_smart_device_id_1 = shd.smart_device_id left join
user_info
ui on dcl.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}
